steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says we must work with climate using computer models that represent various climate conditions — so we need a verb that means to mimic or reproduce.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
Simulate means to imitate or reproduce a system.
Invent, exaggerate, and preserve either create something new, overstate, or keep unchanged, none of which convey mimicking a system.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
